3236310.name: Unleaving Art Book
3236310.description:
Unleaving: Behind the Art and Sketches

This book offers behind-the-scenes look at the artistic journey of Unleaving, focusing on early sketches, art snippets, and the raw creative process that shaped the game’s visual identity. Readers will get a glimpse of the organic evolution of ideas through pencil sketches, concept art, and atmospheric drafts that ultimately breathe life into the game’s world.

The book emphasizes the spontaneous moments of discovery, trial, and error, capturing the essence of experimentation and persistence that went into crafting Unleaving.
